crime.value: Multiple murders on an isolated island. At least one victim (Orczy) killed; investigation centers on establishing method and opportunity among confined group.
crime.quote: The person who killed Orczy this morning is one of us here and it might have been Agatha.

victim.value: Orczy (victim identified). Other victims implied but not detailed in excerpt. Relationship to killers and motives unclear from source.
victim.quote: The person who killed Orczy this morning is one of us here

closed_world.value: The Decagon House on an isolated island. Group of students confined together; no exit apparent during investigation period.
closed_world.quote: The Decagon House Murders... a group of students from the thinly-disguised K—University Mystery Club

investigator.value: Ellery and Leroux (characters engaged in interrogation/investigation of suspects within the group). Appears to be an internal investigation among trapped parties.
investigator.quote: Really? So Leroux, you are absolutely positive that Agatha... I think that you of all, Ellery, acted the strangest
